title: Scarlet fever - NHS
text:
water
use tissues to trap germs from coughs or sneezes
bin used tissues as quickly as possible
Don’t
do not share cutlery, cups, towels, clothes, bedding or baths with anyone else
Page last reviewed: 23 December 2024
Next review due: 23 December 2027
